user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view candidates whose candidature was cancelled in a list with full details and Cancelled interview status, so that I can track cancelled candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Cancelled screen; When the list loads; Then cancelled candidates are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to search cancelled candidates by name, so that I can find a specific cancelled record
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Cancelled screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the cancelled list, so that I see the latest cancelled candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Cancelled screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to navigate to other hiring stage filters, so that I can move between pipeline stages from the Cancelled view
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Cancelled screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count
